---
title: "Spatial data visualisation with R"
description: "James Cheshire and Robin Lovelace (2015). Spatial data visualisation with R. *Geocomputation*."
date: "2015-01-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "cheshire_spatial_2015"
citation-type: "chapter"
citation-type-label: "Book Chapter"
venue: "Geocomputation"
doi: ""
publication-url: "https://github.com/geocomPP/sdv"
authors:
  - "James Cheshire"
  - "Robin Lovelace"
abstract: "This guide demonstrates techniques for creating effective and informative spatial visualizations using the R programming language. It covers a range of mapping methods and graphic packages for geographic data analysis."
---

**Type:** Book Chapter
**Venue:** Geocomputation
**Year:** 2015

[URL](https://github.com/geocomPP/sdv) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Abstract

This guide demonstrates techniques for creating effective and informative spatial visualizations using the R programming language. It covers a range of mapping methods and graphic packages for geographic data analysis.

## Citation

James Cheshire and Robin Lovelace (2015). Spatial data visualisation with R. *Geocomputation*.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@incollection{cheshire_spatial_2015,
	title = {Spatial data visualisation with {R}},
	copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication},
	url = {https://github.com/geocomPP/sdv},
	abstract = {This guide demonstrates techniques for creating effective and informative spatial visualizations using the R programming language. It covers a range of mapping methods and graphic packages for geographic data analysis.},
	booktitle = {Geocomputation},
	publisher = {SAGE Publications},
	author = {Cheshire, James and Lovelace, Robin},
	editor = {Brunsdon, Chris and Singleton, Alex},
	year = {2015},
	pages = {1--14},
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
